title: Public Market Symbol Snapshot
description: One-shot selected-symbol refresh response (2026-07-history-background-refresh-v1). The backend submits one RefreshSymbolCommand to its serial background worker, waits within a bounded timeout, then projects ONLY the selected row from the newly published canonical PublishedState. The row shares the same published_version as the full snapshot (same-version guarantee by construction). This payload never contains a full rows array.

refresh_status.description: ok = all selected sources refreshed; partial = public/history refreshed but borrow fell back to last-good (warning); timeout = the command reached its shared deadline before publication, so the row is projected from the previously published state.

row.description: A single element projected from PublishedState.rows_by_symbol, identical in shape to a snapshot.rows[] element. There is never a rows array on this payload.
